query: SELECT id, branchId, inspectionDate, restaurantManagerName, totalScore FROM field_inspections ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as answer_count FROM field_inspection_answers WHERE inspectionId = (SELECT id FROM field_inspections ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
